nasb.text: This is the land which you shall divide by lot to the tribes of Israel for an inheritance, and these are their several portions,” declares the Lord God.

esv.text: This is the land that you shall allot as an inheritance among the tribes of Israel, and these are their portions, declares the Lord God.

cnv.text: 這就是你們要抽籤分給以色列各支派為業的地。這些分地就是他們所得的分。”這是主耶和華的宣告。

ccb.text: 这就是你们要抽签分给以色列各支派的土地，作为他们的产业。这是主耶和华说的。
